name: MassSlide
short_one_line_description: A mass slides under force while friction and velocity are observed over time.

prompt_combinations.agent_instruction:
Analyze a sliding-mass simulator and identify the changed parameter, or no_intervention.

The simulator records displacement, velocity, applied force, and friction force over time.

Analyze a sliding-mass simulator and identify the changed parameter, or no_intervention.

The simulator records displacement, velocity, applied force, and friction force over time.

Example: increased friction reduces acceleration after the intervention. Example: increased mass reduces acceleration without changing applied force.

Analyze a sliding-mass simulator and return a concise programmatic answer naming the changed parameter and evidence.
